zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Fynderne於1429年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏望塔時，她的父親William Findern of Childrey34歲，母親Elizabeth Childrey36歲。她於1445年與Sir Thomas de la Mare在英國英格蘭波克夏阿爾德馬斯頓 考特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1493年在英國英格蘭波克夏阿爾德馬斯頓享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Fynderne was born in 1429, in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Findern of Childrey, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Childrey, was 36. She married Sir Thomas de la Mare in 1445, in Aldermaston Court, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1493, in Aldermaston, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de la Mare en 1445, à Aldermaston Court, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1493, à Aldermaston, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Fynderneが1429年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジで生まれた時，父William Findern of Childreyは34歳，母Elizabeth Childreyは36歳であった。1445年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアルデルマストン コウルトでSir Thomas de la Mareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1493年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアルデルマストンで64歳で死去した。

ko.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Fynderne(이)가 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 완타지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Findern of Childrey(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Childrey(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 알더마스턴 쿠르트에서 Sir Thomas de la Mare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 알더마스턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de la Mare em 1445, em Aldermaston Court, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Fynderne родилась в 1429 г. в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Findern of Childrey было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Childrey, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de la Mare в 1445 г. в местности алдирмастон коурт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1493 г. в местности алдирмастон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
